title: Why did God (Christ) died for us?
author: Alexis Sosa Ramos
excerpt: Why did Jesus laid down His life for us?
content:
Humans once had a direct connection to God believe it or not!.
God from the start walked among his creation and interacted with it.
Including Adam, So why did this separation happen?,
It happens when man decided to be like God and eat of the forbidden fruit.
Now God already told Adam that if he ever ate of this surely he would die.
And eventually He did but He didn't dealt with the judgement right away because God so loved the world that He gave His one and only begotten Son, that whoever believes in Him shall not perish but have everlasting life.
So He had a plan to restore the direct connection to His children by laying down His life as a ramson for many, meaning that he took on sin and freed us from the damnation we were in.
The wages of sin is death, God, a perfect sinless being cannot be where sin is.
Thats why he had to take on human nature, humbling himself to fullfil the Law and the prophecies of Him coming, to then be given by grace salvation through the Son, The Word, The Lamb of God salvation.
Everything was well thought out, and the reason behind all of this is Pure Love.
Hallelujah! Ã°ÂÂÂÃ¢ÂÂÃ¯Â¸Â
